stories.asA: researcher chatting about a paper PDF
stories.iWant: previous PDF context recorded without being replayed every turn
stories.soThat: the model can request missing local context without wasting tokens
acceptanceCriteria: Old selected text and retrieved passages are not injected into later API messages.
A ledger records prior context type, sizes, and ranges without source text.
The system prompt says the ledger is not currently attached source text.

stories.iWant: the agent to use Zotero annotations as a context tool
stories.soThat: my highlights and comments can guide paper discussion
acceptanceCriteria: The model can call an annotations context tool.
The Zotero source can read annotation text, comments, page labels, colors, and order.
Annotation context is attached only for the current turn.

stories.asA: researcher asking about a known PDF range
stories.iWant: the agent to read that exact local PDF range instead of the full PDF
stories.soThat: follow-up questions stay precise and token efficient
acceptanceCriteria: Range requests call pdf_range only when the model provides rangeStart and rangeEnd.
The local tool extracts only that exact range with a policy cap.
If range validation fails, the harness does not guess a replacement range or search query.

stories.soThat: future harness tools do not scatter magic numbers through UI code
acceptanceCriteria: Context limits live in a ContextPolicy module.
Retrieval and sidebar context execution use the policy object.
Harness behavior is documented in docs/HARNESS_ENGINEERING.md.
